synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23385 Oracle Linux 8 util-linux bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23385
description:
[2.32.1-47.0.1]
- Orabug 35995159 - report lost loop device

[2.32.1-47]
- fix RHEL-117686 - lslogins: use sd_journal_get_data() in proper way
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23385

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23385.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

[2.32.1-47.0.1]
- Orabug 35995159 - report lost loop device

[2.32.1-47]
- fix RHEL-117686 - lslogins: use sd_journal_get_data() in proper way
